aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Fast-paced aur slightly restless

💼 Career: Jaldi decision lene ka pressure aa sakta hai

❤️ Love: Tone control karna important hoga

💰 Money: Risky move avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Pause karke sochna seekho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Har urgency real nahi hoti
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Stable aur composed

💼 Career: Consistent effort ka reward mil sakta hai

❤️ Love: Emotional security strong feel hogi

💰 Money: Savings grow ho sakti hai

🧘 Advice: Change ko resist mat karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Jo change se darte hain, woh growth miss karte hain
